title: URL Health Check
description: Pings a URL over HTTP GET and reports status code and latency.

permissions.reason: Used by `ops.url-health-check.ping` to issue the outbound GET against the target host.
Used by `ops.url-health-check.ping` to measure elapsed wall-clock latency around the request.

actions.description: Performs an HTTP GET against the supplied URL and returns its status code with measured latency.
